text: Being here, I sense the intersection of discipline and creativity—the quiet, ordered space of the first scene juxtaposed with the vibrant, intellectually stimulating environment of the second. In the modernity of glass walls and neat corridors, I feel anticipation, as if awaiting the birth of an idea. Standing before the bold 'R+D' display, I am invigorated by possibility, reminded that knowledge expands when confronted with curiosity. The vision of research and development prompts an inward reflection on my own evolution, marveling at humanity’s ceaseless quest to connect, invent, and understand.
